title: ETA Prediction Pipeline
tagline: Internship project at Lyft — maps & routing
description: Contributed to feature engineering and evaluation infrastructure for ride ETA models, improving prediction accuracy on edge-case routes.
problem: ETA errors on complex urban corridors disproportionately affect rider trust and driver dispatch efficiency.
approach: Built offline evaluation notebooks comparing model variants on stratified route segments. Shipped two features to the production pipeline after rigorous shadow testing.
solution: One feature reduced MAE by ~4% on highway-to-surface-street transitions in the Bay Area market.
learned: Production ML is 20% modeling and 80% data plumbing, monitoring, and stakeholder alignment. Shipping small, measurable wins compounds.
